caption: The video begins with a blue-themed title screen featuring the word "POLICY" prominently displayed over a globe, set against a backdrop of a world map. The scene transitions to reveal the full title "WORLD POLICY CONFERENCE," indicating that this is the 16th edition of the event, focusing on the theme of "GLOBAL GOVERNANCE." The dates and location are also provided: November 3-5, 2023, in Abu Dhabi. The visual elements maintain a consistent blue color scheme, emphasizing a sense of global unity and professionalism, likely setting the stage for discussions on international policy and governance issues.
